versions.version_description: This song is in the Key of E

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is my tab. It's pretty accurate.....
Please send me comments, corrections.

Tabbed by Wajon (wallacejohnbarnes@yahoo.com)


Chords:

[tab]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]   [ch]F#11[/ch]     [ch]C#5[/ch]      [ch]B5[/ch]       [ch]A5[/ch]       [ch]F#5[/ch]
e|--0--------0--------0--------0-----------------------------------------|
B|--0--------0--------0--------0-----------------------------------------|
G|--4--------2--------4--------3--------6--------4-----------------------|
D|--2--------2--------4--------4--------6--------4--------7--------4-----|
A|--4--------0--------2--------4--------4--------2--------7--------4-----|
E|-----------------------------2--------------------------5--------2-----|[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                    [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I've got another confession to make,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'm your fool,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Everyones got their chains to break,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Holdin' you,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
Were you born to resist,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Or be abused,[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Are you gone and on to someone new,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I needed somewhere to hang my head,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Without youre noose,[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C#m7[/ch]
You gave me something that I didn't have,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But had no use,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
I was to weak to give in,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Too strong to lose,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]
My heart is under arrest again,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But I break loose,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]          
My head is giving me life or death,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But I can't choose,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
I swear Ill never give in,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I refuse,[/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                          [ch]C#m7[/ch]       [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith, its real, the pain you feel,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]           [ch]F#11[/ch]
You trust, you must confess,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                          [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]            [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Oh.........[/tab]
[ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]F#11[/ch]
[tab][ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
Oh.........[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
Oh.........[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
Oh.........[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
Oh.........[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                        [ch]C#5[/ch]                     [ch]B5[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith, its real, the pain you feel,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A5[/ch]              [ch]F#5[/ch]
The life, the love, you die to heal,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#5[/ch]              [ch]B5[/ch]          
The hope, that starts, the broken hearts,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A5[/ch]                      
You trust, you must confess.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F#5[/ch]                         [ch]C#5[/ch]                        [ch]B5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                     [ch]C#5[/ch]                   [ch]B5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I've got another confession my friend,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'm no fool,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I'm getting tired of starting again,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Somewhere new,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]B5[/ch]
Were you born to resist?, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Or be abused,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]B5[/ch]
I swear i'll never give in,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I refuse,[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F#5[/ch]                         [ch]C#5[/ch]                        [ch]B5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                     [ch]C#5[/ch]                   [ch]B5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]Esus2/B[/ch]
Has someone taken the faith, its real, the pain you feel,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]           [ch]F#11[/ch]
You trust, you must confess,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#11[/ch]                            [ch]C#5[/ch]      [ch]B5[/ch]           [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you,[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]C#5[/ch]
Ohh..............[/tab]
